name: GODANNAR!!
original_name: 神魂合体ゴーダンナー！！
overview: Five years ago, while battling an alien force, pilot Goh Saruwatari first met Anna Aoi. Today, on the day of their wedding, the ceremony is interrupted when the aliens strike again.

trailers.title: Opening 1 | Marriage of God and Soul Godannar - Akira Kushida
